name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tchd

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tchd
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Tchd SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Tchd SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-tchd
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common tchd
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.tchd.v20230306.tchd_client.TchdClient.DescribeEvents
documentation:
本接口用于查询腾讯云健康看板的可用性事件信息，可以通过产品列表、地域列表和事件发生日期进行过滤查询。
当查询的产品对应时间内无事件时将返回空结果。
可以参考健康看板历史事件页面来获取查询案例（链接：<https://status.cloud.tencent.com/history>）。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeEvents.

type request



rtype

```
